stemHtml: A young adult interested in becoming a pilot is invited into the cockpit. They are interested in the weather radar and ask the pilot why there is a tilt knob on the control unit. The pilot replies that this to control the upwards and downwards tilt of the antenna, as required for the two main tasks of the radar, which are...

options.b: detecting turbulence and functioning in WX+T mode.
options.c: ground mapping and controlling the gain of the beam.
options.d: detecting significant weather and ground mapping.
